name: Strings
description: Master character array manipulations, substring searches, and window sliding optimizations.
learning_objectives: Understand character ascii mappings and frequency counting structures
Deploy sliding window techniques to evaluate substring properties in O(N) time

patterns.name: Sliding Window
patterns.description: Maintain a dynamic window of elements to optimize subarray/substring checks.

concepts.name: Substring Sub-segment Scanning
concepts.theory_markdown:
# Substring Sub-segment Scanning

Sliding Window is a technique that converts nested loop solutions `O(N^2)` into linear search sweeps `O(N)`.

### The Core Idea

Keep `left` and `right` boundary markers. Expand `right` to include elements, and shrink `left` when window invariants are violated (e.g. repeating characters).
learning_objectives: Implement variable length sliding windows using two pointers
Leverage hash-sets or frequency tables to validate uniqueness constraints
